 Specialization of AnalysisPassModel which passes an AnalysisManager to PassT's run method. More...

 Specialization of AnalysisPassModel which does not pass an AnalysisManager to PassT's run method. More...

Namespaces

namespace  llvm
 List of target independent CodeGen pass IDs.
namespace  llvm::detail
 Implementation details of the pass manager interfaces.

Detailed Description

This header provides internal APIs and implementation details used by the pass management interfaces exposed in PassManager.h. To understand more context of why these particular interfaces are needed, see that header file. None of these APIs should be used elsewhere.

Definition in file PassManagerInternal.h.
